scripts.preview-ps: docker compose -f proof-server.yml pull && node --no-warnings --experimental-specifier-resolution=node --loader ts-node/esm src/preview-start-proof-server.ts
scripts.preprod-ps: docker compose -f proof-server.yml pull && node --no-warnings --experimental-specifier-resolution=node --loader ts-node/esm src/preprod-start-proof-server.ts
